message:
refactor: migrate tokio direct-deps to fcp-async-core across 6 crates

Remove tokio from [dev-dependencies] in fcp-google-discovery,
fcp-oauth, fcp-streaming, google-calendar, and slack connectors.
In fcp-sandbox, replace the tokio dependency with fcp-async-core and
switch all `tokio::time::timeout` / `#[tokio::test]` /
`tokio::runtime::Builder` call-sites to their fcp-async-core
equivalents. Update Cargo.lock accordingly.

This continues the runtime-abstraction effort tracked in the
asupersync tokio exception ledger, reducing direct tokio surface
area to the crates that genuinely need it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2718,7 +2718,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
  "uuid",
@@ -2738,7 +2737,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "wiremock",
 ]
 
@@ -3261,7 +3259,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "sha1",
  "sha2",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "url",
  "wiremock",
@@ -3676,6 +3673,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "async-trait",
  "bytes",
  "ciborium",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-manifest",
  "idna",
@@ -3686,7 +3684,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
  "url",
@@ -3812,7 +3809,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tokio-tungstenite",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
@@ -3893,7 +3889,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "wiremock",
 ]

@@ -1159,10 +1159,10 @@ mod tests {
     where
         F: std::future::Future<Output = T>,
     {
-        tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
+        fcp_async_core::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
             .enable_all()
             .build()
-            .expect("build tokio test runtime")
+            .expect("build test runtime")
             .block_on(future)
     }

@@ -47,5 +47,4 @@ serde_urlencoded = "0.7"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-tokio = { version = "1.49", features = ["rt", "macros"] }
 wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -594,10 +594,10 @@ mod tests {
     where
         F: std::future::Future<Output = T>,
     {
-        tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
+        fcp_async_core::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
             .enable_all()
             .build()
-            .expect("build tokio test runtime")
+            .expect("build test runtime")
             .block_on(future)
     }

@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ nursery = "warn"
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
 fcp-core.workspace = true
 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 idna = "1.0"
@@ -30,7 +31,6 @@ thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 url.workspace = true
 rand.workspace = true
-tokio = { version = "1.49", features = ["macros", "rt", "time"] }
 
 # WASI runtime
 wasmtime.workspace = true
